items.title: S&P 500 Rises to 7575 Points
items.content: US500 rose to 7575 points on July 10, gaining 0.42%. Up 2.45% over past month and 21.02% YoY.

items.title: S&P 500 and NASDAQ Record Second Positive Week
items.content: S&P 500 finished more than 1% higher, NASDAQ added nearly 2% as indexes recorded second positive week. Stocks alternating between modest gains and losses since early June as investors assess AI-related outlook.

items.title: Hong Kong Stocks Log Strongest Week in 9 Months
items.content: Hang Seng Index up 0.6% on day, advanced nearly 4% for the week — its biggest weekly gain in 9 months. China CSI300 fell 2%, Shanghai Composite lost 1%.

items.title: Hang Seng Index Forecast: Key Levels at 26506 and 27419
items.content: Clearance of 26506 brings prior highs of April/May 2026 into view. 27419 is additional upside target if 26506 gives way.

items.title: US Inflation Accelerated to 3.8% in April 2026
items.content: Annual inflation rate in the US accelerated to 3.8% in April 2026, highest since May 2023. Core consumer prices estimated to have risen 0.3% monthly.

items.title: Goldman Warns AI-Driven Inflation Will Hit US Hardest
items.content: Goldman Sachs estimates AI adding ~20bp to US core PCE annually, rising to 50bp by year-end. Memory chip prices surged — 8GB DDR5 module at $148, more than triple from $35. US bears brunt vs 10bp average for other developed nations.

items.title: JPMorgan Midyear Outlook: Core PCE at 3.4%, GDP 1.5-2.0%
items.content: JPMorgan expects US GDP growth of 1.5-2.0% for 2026 with resilient consumer spending, robust AI capex and contained Middle East tensions. Core PCE outlook raised to 3.4% year end from 2.9%, driven by supply shock.

items.title: US Seeks Free Hormuz Access as Iran Talks Continue
items.content: Trump says US and Iran agree to continue ceasefire talks. US seeks free passage through Strait of Hormuz as key negotiating point.

items.title: China Tech Stocks Capture Elderly Retail Investors Amid AI Faith
items.content: Technology stocks become new darlings of Chinese retail investors betting on chipmakers and AI. Star Market (SSE Sci-Tech Board) reached US$2.3 trillion market cap since 2018 launch. AI-model names saw froth deflate — Zhipu -19.3% in one day, MiniMax at 6-month low.

items.title: Key Earnings This Week: JPMorgan, Goldman, TSMC, Netflix, UnitedHealth
items.content: JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs lead bank earnings Tuesday. CPI and PPI inflation data expected to show cooling. AI stocks projected to fuel S&P 500 growth. This week's key earnings: JPM, GS, TSMC, NFLX, UNH.

items.title: Semiconductor Sector Sell-Off on June 5 — AMD and Intel Led Decline
items.content: Semiconductor sector experienced sharp downturn on June 5 with AMD and Intel leading decline. Sector remains a bellwether for technology and broader market sentiment.

items.title: Strait of Hormuz Crisis: US Navy Announces Widened Route
items.content: On June 27, US Navy JMIC announced widened route through Strait of Hormuz. Ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah announced June 19 but Iran re-closed strait citing Israeli actions. War cost to US taxpayers estimated at $113.3B as of June 16.
